allow: Bash(./venv/bin/mypy --ignore-missing-imports --disallow-untyped-defs --warn-return-any --python-version 3.12 --no-error-summary aeva/app.py aeva/llm/ aeva/auth/auth_controller.py aeva/chat/chat_controller.py aeva/assistant/assistant_controller.py)
